Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Written Responses To Req. For Production For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Based on no appearances the parties deemed stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. PLAINTIFF SUSAN DOWNEY's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Written Responses To Req. For Production For Sanctions is denied on the basis that the discovery propounded has not been shown relevant in light of the defendant's stipulation concerning liability and agency dated January 13, 2012. Order signed in open court. Mark Schreiber Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =302/JPT
